event_text: Patient received duplicate dose of medication after shift handoff confusion.
summary: Patient received a duplicate dose of medication due to confusion during shift handoff.
recommended_action: Review handoff procedures and implement additional training for staff on medication reconciliation.

event_text: Patient slipped while walking to restroom and reported hip pain.
summary: Patient slipped while walking to restroom and reported hip pain.
recommended_action: Assess the patient for injuries and monitor for any changes in condition.

event_text: IV site showed redness and swelling during morning rounds.
summary: IV site exhibited redness and swelling during morning rounds.
recommended_action: Monitor the IV site closely and assess for signs of infection or complications.

event_text: Nurse documented medication administration in the wrong chart.
summary: Nurse documented medication administration in the wrong chart.
recommended_action: Review documentation procedures and provide additional training to nursing staff.

event_text: Delay in provider communication led to postponed discharge instructions.
summary: Delay in provider communication resulted in postponed discharge instructions.
recommended_action: Improve communication protocols to ensure timely discharge instructions.
